tasks.description: Remove Telegram and Activity services from boilerplate
steps: Verify lib/services/telegram/ directory does not exist
Verify lib/services/activity/ directory does not exist
Verify Telegram.Live and Activity.Live are not referenced in lib/layers.ts
Verify no Telegram/Activity imports remain in codebase (grep for 'telegram' and 'activity' in lib/)
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Remove example/scaffolding code (post CRUD, example API routes)
steps: Verify lib/core/post/ directory does not exist
Verify app/api/example/ directory does not exist
Verify post table and relations removed from lib/services/db/schema.ts
Verify no post-related imports remain in codebase
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Update package.json, AGENTS.md, README.md, and .env.example for tidn project
steps: Verify package.json name is 'tidn'
Verify AGENTS.md describes tidn timeline app (not boilerplate)
Verify AGENTS.md has no references to Telegram, Activity, or post example
Verify AGENTS.md service hierarchy shows only Auth, Db, Email, S3
Verify README.md describes tidn project
Verify .env.example has no TELEGRAM_* vars
Verify proxy.ts public routes are correct for tidn

tasks.description: Clean up main page after removing post example (blank or redirect)
steps: Verify app/page.tsx compiles without post references
Verify app/search-params.ts has no post-related search params
Verify all post-related client components (post-search, post-published-filter, post-sort-select) are removed
pnpm tsc passes
pnpm lint passes

tasks.description: Create timeline table in database schema
steps: Verify timeline table exists in lib/services/db/schema.ts with columns: id (CUID2), name (text, required), description (text, nullable), ownerId (FK -> user.id, cascade delete), createdAt, updatedAt
Verify relation: user -> ownedTimelines (one-to-many)
Verify relation: timeline -> owner (many-to-one)
pnpm tsc passes
pnpm db:push succeeds or migration generates cleanly

tasks.description: Create timeline_member table for collaboration/invitations
steps: Verify timeline_member table in schema with columns: id (CUID2), timelineId (FK -> timeline.id, cascade), userId (FK -> user.id, nullable), email (text), role (enum: editor|viewer), invitedAt, joinedAt (nullable), createdAt, updatedAt
Verify unique constraint on (timelineId, email)
Verify relations: timeline -> members, user -> timelineMemberships, timelineMember -> timeline, timelineMember -> user (nullable)
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Create event table for timeline entries
steps: Verify event table in schema with columns: id (CUID2), timelineId (FK -> timeline.id, cascade), date (date type, required), comment (text, nullable), createdById (FK -> user.id), createdAt, updatedAt
Verify index on (timelineId, date) for chronological queries
Verify relations: timeline -> events (one-to-many), event -> timeline, event -> createdBy
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Create media table for photos/videos attached to events
steps: Verify media table in schema with columns: id (CUID2), eventId (FK -> event.id, cascade), type (enum: photo|video), s3Key (text), thumbnailS3Key (text, nullable), fileName (text), mimeType (text), fileSize (integer), width (integer, nullable), height (integer, nullable), duration (integer, nullable), processingStatus (enum: pending|processing|completed|failed), uploadedById (FK -> user.id), createdAt, updatedAt
Verify relations: event -> media (one-to-many), media -> event, media -> uploadedBy
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Create timeline action — user can create a new timeline
steps: Verify lib/core/timeline/create-timeline-action.ts exists following server action pattern
Verify action validates input (name required) with Effect Schema
Verify action gets session, creates timeline with ownerId = session.user.id
Verify action returns { _tag: 'Success', timeline } or { _tag: 'Error', message }
Verify action has Effect.withSpan('action.timeline.create')
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Update timeline action — owner can edit name/description
steps: Verify lib/core/timeline/update-timeline-action.ts exists
Verify action checks session user is timeline owner (UnauthorizedError if not)
Verify action updates name and/or description
Verify action revalidates timeline path
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Delete timeline action — owner can delete timeline (cascades events + media)
steps: Verify lib/core/timeline/delete-timeline-action.ts exists
Verify action checks session user is timeline owner
Verify action deletes all associated S3 media files (list + batch delete by prefix or iterate media records)
Verify action deletes timeline record (cascade handles events, media, members in DB)
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Get timelines query — list all timelines user owns or has access to
steps: Verify lib/core/timeline/get-timelines.ts exists
Verify query returns timelines where user is owner OR is a member (joined, not just invited)
Verify each timeline result includes role (owner/editor/viewer)
Verify query is an Effect requiring Auth + Db services
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Timeline access guard — reusable function to verify user has access to a timeline with required role
steps: Verify a function exists (e.g., getTimelineAccess or assertTimelineAccess) that takes timelineId and required role
Verify it returns the timeline + user's role if authorized
Verify it fails with NotFoundError if timeline doesn't exist
Verify it fails with UnauthorizedError if user lacks required role
Verify owner has implicit access at all levels
Verify editor has edit + view access, viewer has view-only access
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Invite member action — timeline owner can invite by email with role
steps: Verify lib/core/timeline/invite-member-action.ts exists
Verify action validates email (Effect Schema) and role (editor|viewer)
Verify only timeline owner can invite (UnauthorizedError otherwise)
Verify if email matches existing user, userId is set on timeline_member record
Verify if email is unknown, userId is null (pending invite)
Verify duplicate invite to same email+timeline returns appropriate error
Verify invitation email is sent via Email service
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Update member role action — owner can change collaborator role
steps: Verify lib/core/timeline/update-member-role-action.ts exists
Verify only timeline owner can update roles
Verify role is updated to new value (editor|viewer)
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Remove member action — owner can revoke access
steps: Verify lib/core/timeline/remove-member-action.ts exists
Verify only timeline owner can remove members
Verify owner cannot remove themselves
Verify member record is deleted
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Fulfill pending invitations on user signup — link timeline access when invited email registers
steps: Verify that when a new user signs up, any timeline_member records matching their email get userId set and joinedAt populated
Verify this runs as part of the auth flow (e.g., after-signup hook or checked on first login)
Verify previously pending invitations now grant the user access to those timelines
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Create event action — add an event to a timeline with date and optional comment
steps: Verify lib/core/event/create-event-action.ts exists
Verify action validates input: timelineId (required), date (required, date string), comment (optional)
Verify action checks user has editor or owner access to the timeline
Verify action creates event with createdById = session.user.id
Verify action revalidates timeline path
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Update event action — edit event date and/or comment
steps: Verify lib/core/event/update-event-action.ts exists
Verify action checks user has editor or owner access to the event's timeline
Verify action updates date and/or comment fields
Verify action revalidates timeline path
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Delete event action — remove event and cascade-delete its media from S3
steps: Verify lib/core/event/delete-event-action.ts exists
Verify action checks user has editor or owner access
Verify action deletes associated S3 files (original + thumbnails) for all media in the event
Verify action deletes event record (cascades media records in DB)
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Get events query — paginated chronological event list for a timeline
steps: Verify lib/core/event/get-events.ts exists
Verify query uses cursor-based pagination (not offset)
Verify events are ordered by date (configurable newest-first or oldest-first)
Verify query includes media records for each event (with thumbnailS3Key, processingStatus)
Verify query checks user has at least viewer access to timeline
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Get media upload URL action — generate signed S3 PUT URL for a media file
steps: Verify lib/core/media/get-media-upload-url-action.ts exists
Verify action validates input: eventId, fileName, mimeType, fileSize
Verify action checks user has editor/owner access to the event's timeline
Verify action enforces file size limits (20MB photos, 100MB videos)
Verify action validates mimeType against accepted types (JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC, MP4, MOV, WebM)
Verify action creates media record with processingStatus='pending' and returns { uploadUrl, mediaId }
Verify S3 key follows pattern: timelines/{timelineId}/{eventId}/{timestamp}-{fileName}
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Confirm media upload action — mark upload complete and trigger async processing
steps: Verify lib/core/media/confirm-media-upload-action.ts exists
Verify action updates media processingStatus to 'processing'
Verify action triggers async thumbnail/EXIF processing (forked fiber or background job)
Verify action returns success immediately (doesn't wait for processing)
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Delete media action — remove single media file from event and S3
steps: Verify lib/core/media/delete-media-action.ts exists
Verify action checks user has editor/owner access
Verify action deletes original file and thumbnail from S3
Verify action deletes media record from database
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Photo processing — extract EXIF, strip metadata, generate thumbnail
steps: Verify sharp is installed as dependency
Verify processing function downloads original from S3
Verify EXIF date, width, height, orientation are extracted
Verify all EXIF metadata is stripped from the original (GPS, device info removed)
Verify stripped original is re-uploaded to S3 (overwriting original)
Verify thumbnail is generated (reasonable size, e.g., 400px wide) and uploaded as {key}-thumb.{ext}
Verify media record is updated: thumbnailS3Key, width, height, processingStatus='completed'
Verify on failure: processingStatus='failed' (no crash, error logged)
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Video processing — extract frame for thumbnail
steps: Verify a video frame extraction solution is implemented (ffmpeg, WASM, Lambda, or external service)
Verify a frame is extracted from ~1s into the video
Verify frame is uploaded to S3 as {key}-thumb.jpg
Verify media record is updated: thumbnailS3Key, width, height, duration, processingStatus='completed'
Verify on failure: processingStatus='failed' (graceful, error logged)
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: HEIC photo conversion — convert HEIC to JPEG for browser display
steps: Verify HEIC files are detected by mimeType (image/heic, image/heif)
Verify HEIC originals are converted to JPEG during processing
Verify converted JPEG replaces or supplements the original in S3
Verify thumbnail is generated from the converted image
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Timeline list page — shows all timelines user has access to
steps: Verify app/page.tsx (or app/(dashboard)/page.tsx) displays list of timelines
Verify page follows Suspense + Content pattern with force-dynamic
Verify each timeline shows name, description preview, role (owner/editor/viewer)
Verify empty state prompts user to create first timeline
Verify create timeline UI exists (form or dialog with name + description)
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Timeline view page — chronological scrollable event display
steps: Verify app/timeline/[id]/page.tsx exists
Verify page follows Suspense + Content pattern with force-dynamic
Verify events are displayed grouped by date
Verify each date group shows its media thumbnails and comments
Verify cursor-based pagination loads more events on scroll (or explicit load-more)
Verify sort order toggle exists (newest-first / oldest-first)
Verify page checks user has at least viewer access
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Media thumbnail display — photo thumbnails and video thumbnails with play indicator
steps: Verify photo thumbnails display using signed download URLs
Verify video thumbnails display with a visual play indicator overlay
Verify thumbnails in 'pending' or 'processing' state show a loading/placeholder
Verify thumbnails in 'failed' state show a fallback (broken image or retry icon)
Verify clicking a photo opens full-size view (modal or overlay)
Verify clicking a video plays it inline with native video controls
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Drag-and-drop file upload with progress
steps: Verify a drop zone exists on the timeline view that accepts multiple files
Verify accepted file types: JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC, MP4, MOV, WebM
Verify a file picker button exists as alternative to drag-and-drop
Verify user can set a date for the batch (defaults to EXIF date if available, otherwise today)
Verify user can add an optional comment with the upload
Verify upload progress is shown per file
Verify concurrent uploads are limited (3-5 at a time, queued client-side)
Verify files exceeding size limits are rejected with clear error before upload
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Add comment-only event — text entry with date picker
steps: Verify UI exists to add a comment-only event (no media)
Verify date picker is provided for selecting event date
Verify comment text input is provided
Verify comment-only events display in timeline alongside media events
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Edit event — change date, update comment, add/remove media
steps: Verify each event has an edit action (button or menu) visible to editors/owners
Verify edit UI allows changing date
Verify edit UI allows editing comment text
Verify edit UI allows removing individual media from the event
Verify edit UI allows adding more media to an existing event
Verify viewers cannot see edit controls
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Delete event — with confirmation
steps: Verify each event has a delete action visible to editors/owners
Verify confirmation dialog appears before deletion
Verify deletion removes event from timeline view
Verify viewers cannot see delete controls
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Timeline settings page — name, description, member management
steps: Verify app/timeline/[id]/settings/page.tsx exists
Verify owner can edit timeline name and description
Verify owner can see list of members with their roles
Verify owner can invite new member (email + role picker)
Verify owner can change member role
Verify owner can remove a member
Verify non-owners see read-only settings or are redirected
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Virtualized rendering for large timelines
steps: Verify timeline view uses virtualization (e.g., @tanstack/react-virtual or similar)
Verify scrolling through 1000+ events feels smooth (no jank)
Verify only visible events + buffer are rendered in DOM
Verify signed URLs are fetched/refreshed as items scroll into viewport
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Responsive layout — mobile-first, works on 360px+ screens
steps: Verify timeline list page is usable on 360px width
Verify timeline view page is usable on 360px width
Verify file upload works on mobile (tap-to-select file picker)
Verify thumbnail grid adapts to screen width (fewer columns on mobile)
Verify settings page is usable on mobile
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: PWA manifest and service worker for installability
steps: Verify web app manifest exists with name 'tidn', icons, theme color, display: standalone
Verify service worker caches app shell (HTML, CSS, JS bundles)
Verify app passes Lighthouse PWA installability audit
Verify app is installable on mobile browsers (iOS Safari, Chrome Android)
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Media access control — only authorized users can view media via signed URLs
steps: Verify signed download URLs are only generated for users with access to the media's timeline
Verify signed URLs have a reasonable expiry (e.g., 1 hour)
Verify direct S3 bucket access is not public (bucket policy)
Verify upload URLs are only generated for users with editor/owner access
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Authorization enforcement — editors can mutate, viewers can only read
steps: Verify all mutation actions (create/update/delete event, upload media) check for editor or owner role
Verify all read actions/queries check for at least viewer role
Verify timeline settings mutations (invite, role change, remove) check for owner role
Verify unauthenticated requests redirect to /login
pnpm tsc passes

tasks.description: Tests for timeline CRUD and access control
steps: Verify tests exist for create/update/delete timeline actions
Verify tests cover ownership checks (non-owner cannot update/delete)
Verify tests cover the get-timelines query (returns owned + member timelines)
Verify tests for timeline access guard (owner/editor/viewer/no-access scenarios)
pnpm test:run passes

tasks.description: Tests for event CRUD and permissions
steps: Verify tests exist for create/update/delete event actions
Verify tests cover editor can create/edit/delete events
Verify tests cover viewer cannot create/edit/delete events
Verify tests for get-events query (pagination, sort order)
pnpm test:run passes

tasks.description: Tests for collaboration (invite, role, remove, pending fulfillment)
steps: Verify tests exist for invite-member action (existing user, new user, duplicate invite)
Verify tests for update-member-role action
Verify tests for remove-member action (owner cannot self-remove)
Verify tests for pending invitation fulfillment on signup
pnpm test:run passes

tasks.description: Tests for media upload flow and processing
steps: Verify tests for get-media-upload-url action (file size limits, mime type validation)
Verify tests for confirm-media-upload action
Verify tests for delete-media action (S3 cleanup)
Verify tests for photo processing (EXIF extraction, stripping, thumbnail generation)
pnpm test:run passes

tasks.description: Spans and error logging on all actions and services
steps: Verify all server actions have Effect.withSpan('action.<domain>.<verb>')
Verify all query functions have Effect.withSpan
Verify error paths use Effect.tapError for logging
Verify media processing has spans tracking duration
pnpm tsc passes

patterns: Server actions: lib/core/post/create-post-action.ts (to be removed, but pattern is the reference)
Database schema: lib/services/db/schema.ts (CUID2 IDs, createdAt/updatedAt, Drizzle RQB v2 relations)
Page pattern: Suspense + Content component, force-dynamic, nuqs URL state
Effect services: Effect.Service with static layer/Live, composed in lib/layers.ts
